dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}... what do you mean they were building a surprise? A what?
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You're telling me {target_npc} was sneaking {location_hint} to build a root cellar for the settlement as a gift? And the {quest_item} was construction material? I've already told half the council they were a thief. {target_npc} has probably heard. They've gone off toward {location} alone, upset, and there are {enemy_type} in those hills. I need you to find them and bring more {quest_item} so the project can be completed. Maybe that undoes some damage.
dialogueChunks.outro: I accused my neighbor of betrayal because I couldn't imagine {quest_focus} being something kind. What does that say about me?

playerResponses.text: It says you're human. I'll find them and bring them home.
You really jumped to the worst conclusion, didn't you. I'll fix it.
Clean up your own mess. I found the truth; the rest is on you.

dialogueChunks.intro: This is worse than I thought, {player_name}. Much worse: but not in the way I expected.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} wasn't scheming at all. They were gathering {quest_item} {location_hint} to pay off a debt that threatened their family. They kept it secret out of shame. Now, because I spread rumors, the whole settlement shuns them. {quest_threat} was just a desperate person hiding a private struggle. The debt collector arrives in three days. I need you to gather the remaining {quest_item}.
dialogueChunks.outro: I turned {quest_stakes} into a public humiliation. The least I can do is help fix what I broke.

playerResponses.text: Everyone makes mistakes. Let's make this right.
Three days, a debt, and your guilt. This is quite a tangle.
You caused this. Pay the debt yourself.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I owe you an apology. And I owe {target_npc} far more than that.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} were visits to a sick relative in a camp {location_hint}. {target_npc} kept it secret to prevent panic about contagion. The {quest_item} was medicine, not contraband. Now that I've stirred suspicion, {target_npc} refuses to return to {location}. Their relative's condition is worsening and they need more {quest_item} from deeper in {enemy_type} territory.
dialogueChunks.outro: I let suspicion eat me alive and hurt the one person who least deserved it. {quest_stakes} is in ruins because of me.

playerResponses.text: I'll bring the medicine and talk to them. People can forgive.
You certainly made a mess of things. I'll try to sort it out.
You shattered their trust. That's not something I can fix.
